cycles.name: C_TEST_DECOUPLE

deliverables.description: Decouple test helpers from hardcoded .phase-gate paths

cycles.exit_criteria: All tests use get_default_server_root() instead of hardcoded .phase-gate path and pass.

cycles.name: C_ARCH_FOUNDATION
cycles.exit_criteria: resolved_server_root, resolved_config_root, resolved_template_root properties exist in Settings. mcp_server/assets is populated. template_config.py is deleted.

cycles.name: C_LOADER_PROBES

deliverables.description: Enforce strict dependency injection configuration loading

cycles.exit_criteria: Probing candidates removed from loader.py and DI is enforced.

cycles.name: C_CLI_INIT

deliverables.description: Implement CLI init command and entry point

cycles.exit_criteria: pgmcp --init flat-copies assets, fails-fast if missing, pyproject.toml registers script.

cycles.name: C_WORKSPACE_MIGRATION
cycles.exit_criteria: The repository's .phase-gate/ is renamed to .pgmcp/. Setup configs updated.

cycles.name: C_DEBT_ELIMINATION

deliverables.description: Remove transitional compatibility bridges and support fallbacks

cycles.exit_criteria: Transitional compatibility bridges and settings/support fallbacks are fully removed.
